method: re-collection (Agent a82e20ed) after first attempt failed verification (plausible=False, fab=True, 3 records, geometry contradicted cited sources)

verdict.summary: Re-collected with strict geometry-vs-primary-source cross-checks; explicitly rejected the wrong scaled-up 10MW OC4 numbers that broke attempt 1. Named-vessel crane RAOs confirmed not public; collected benchmark/proxy hulls instead.

coverage_note: RAOs for named commercial crane/installation vessels (Sleipnir, Thialf, Saipem 7000, derrick/pipelay barges) are proprietary and NOT public. Collected proxies instead: NREL OC4-DeepCwind semi (best SSCV-topology proxy) + OC3-Hywind spar (geometry confirmed against NREL-maintained OpenFAST input files since docs.nrel.gov PDFs were unfetchable); turn-key OrcaWave L02 (OC4 semi) and L01 (generic monohull) open RAO datasets; monohull seakeeping benchmarks DTMB 5415/5512, S175, KCS, KVLCC2, Wigley; one open-access box-form pipelay lay-barge AQWA study (closest barge proxy); Capytaine/NEMOH BEM example geometries for tool validation.

records.name: OC4-DeepCwind semisubmersible (NREL 5MW reference)
records.vessel_type: Semisubmersible — proxy for SSCV hull form (three-column ring-pontoon semi with heave-plate base columns; Thialf/Sleipnir/Saipem 7000 topology)

fields.kind: computed (BEM); platform also model-tested in DeepCwind 1:50 MARIN campaign
fields.headings_deg: 0-180 at 22.5 spacing (9 headings, per Orcina OrcaWave dataset)

citations.source: NREL/TP-5000-60601 Robertson et al. (2014) 'Definition of the Semisubmersible Floating System for Phase II of OC4'

gaps: docs.nrel.gov PDF unfetchable live; diameters confirmed via NREL OpenFAST input file + 2 cross-checks
adjacent-column spacing ~50m derived from radial offset, not quoted verbatim

records.name: OrcaWave L02 OC4 Semi-sub diffraction example (Orcina)
records.vessel_type: Semisubmersible — ready-to-run open OrcaWave RAO dataset for the OC4 SSCV proxy

fields.outputs: 6-DOF displacement RAOs, load RAOs, Newman QTFs, added mass/damping, hydrostatic stiffness

citations.source: Orcina 'L Diffraction: L02 OC4 Semi-sub' OrcaWave example

gaps: mesh displaced volume 13917 m3 vs OC4 definition 13986.8 m3 (cross members modelled as Morison, excluded from panel mesh — documented choice)

records.name: OC3-Hywind spar buoy (NREL 5MW reference)
records.vessel_type: Deep-draft spar — proxy for spar-form / deep-draft cylindrical hulls; low-heave benchmark

citations.source: NREL/TP-500-47535 Jonkman (2010) 'Definition of the Floating System for Phase IV of OC3'

gaps: definition-report PDF not directly fetched; water depth + CM from sources citing the report; no canonical RAO heading set quoted

records.name: OrcaWave L01 Default vessel diffraction example (Orcina)

citations.source: Orcina 'L Diffraction: L01 Default vessel' OrcaWave example

gaps: beam, draft, displacement live in the binary .owd/.gdf files — not numerically verified; only length/depth/panel/period/heading counts stated

records.name: KVLCC2 — KRISO VLCC (SIMMAN / CFD Workshop benchmark)

records.name: Wigley hull (Wigley I mathematical hull)
records.vessel_type: Mathematical slender monohull — seakeeping METHOD-validation benchmark (not a barge-shape proxy)

fields.kind: benchmark (analytical hull; strip-theory + Journee 1992 model tests)

citations.source: Ghassemi, Majdfar & Gill (2015) JOMAse Vol.22 — Wigley I geometry + RAOs vs Journee 1992

slender form validates method, not barge geometry

records.name: Pipelay lay-barge (J-Lay/S-Lay) AQWA diffraction study
records.vessel_type: Box-form pipelay/lay barge — closest open derrick/lift/pipelay-barge motion proxy found

fields.kind: computed (ANSYS AQWA 3D panel, ~12586 panels; validated 5-10% diffraction-dominated)
fields.sea_state: JONSWAP Hs=2.5 m Tp=11.5 s gamma=2.8

citations.source: Orji, Ugbeta & Umuteme (2025) 'Dynamic Displacement Analysis of J-Lay and S-Lay Pipe Strings under Lay-Barge Wave Diffraction in 1000m Water Depth' IJAEM 7(12) 547-561

gaps: only peak RAO values tabulated; full curves are figures; mesh/offsets not published
single deepwater head-sea case

records.name: Capytaine & NEMOH BEM example geometries
records.vessel_type: Canonical bodies (sphere/cylinder/cube) — generic computed hydrodynamic proxies + BEM tool-validation

fields.kind: computed (open-source BEM, frequency domain; freely runnable)
fields.water_depth: selectable incl. infinite + finite (Capytaine cookbook 2-100 m)
fields.capytaine_sphere: radius 1.0 m at (0,0,-2), heave added mass ~2208.93 kg @ omega 1.0

gaps: NEMOH example exact dimensions not on rendered page; v3 paper/HAL PDF 403 — NEMOH geometry unverified
Capytaine ships no official rectangular-barge example
